things.name: Catatumbo Lightning
things.description: World's most electrified place - up to 280 lightning strikes per hour over Lake Maracaibo

things.name: General Rafael Urdaneta Bridge
things.description: 8.7km bridge crossing Lake Maracaibo - one of the longest pre-stressed bridges in the world

things.name: Basilica of Our Lady of Chiquinquira
things.description: Patron saint of Venezuela - massive basilica and site of national pilgrimage

things.name: Maracaibo Cathedral
things.description: 18th-century colonial cathedral on the Bolivar Plaza in the historic centre

things.name: Lake Maracaibo Boat Tour
things.description: Boat tour of the oil-rich lake with fishing villages and oil platform views

things.name: Vereda del Lago Park
things.description: Lakeside promenade with fountains, gardens and views of the bridge

things.name: Santa Barbara Castle (Maracaibo Fort)
things.description: 17th-century Spanish fort on the lake shore with a small history museum

things.name: Historic Old Town
things.description: Colonial quarter with Casa de los Capitanes and traditional Marabino architecture

things.name: Los Puertos de Altagracia
things.description: Colonial riverside town across the lake - birthplace of Venezuelan independence heroes

things.name: Rafael Urdaneta University Museum
things.description: History and art museum of western Venezuela with pre-Columbian collections
